WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date

),
time_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date AS window_end_date,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
region_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS region_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= tw.window_start_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= tw.window_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
nation_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS nation_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= tw.window_start_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= tw.window_end_date
),
contribution_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    r.region_sales_52w,
    n.nation_sales_52w,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY r.region_sales_52w DESC, r.campus_region ASC) AS region_rank,
    CAST(
      ROUND((r.region_sales_52w / NULLIF(n.nation_sales_52w, 0)) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER
    ) AS region_contribution_52w_pct_int
  FROM region_agg_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_agg_cte n
),
concentration_summary_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank = 1 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_1_region_contribution_52w_pct_int,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank <= 2 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_2_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank <= 3 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_3_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int
  FROM contribution_cte c
)
SELECT
  tw.window_start_date AS window_start_date,
  tw.window_end_date AS window_end_date,
  c.campus_region,
  c.region_sales_52w,
  c.nation_sales_52w,
  CONCAT(c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "region_contribution_52w%",
  c.region_rank,
  CONCAT(cs.top_1_region_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_1_region_contribution_52w%",
  CONCAT(cs.top_2_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_2_regions_contribution_52w%",
  CONCAT(cs.top_3_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_3_regions_contribution_52w%"
FROM contribution_cte c
CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
CROSS JOIN concentration_summary_cte cs
ORDER BY c.region_sales_52w DESC
LIMIT 10;

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_start_cte AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS start_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
windowed_base_cte AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM data_867 b
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_start_cte s
  WHERE b.week_end_date BETWEEN s.start_week_end_date AND m.max_week_end_date
),
segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS segment_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
  GROUP BY
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ss.parent_id,
    ss.parent_account_name,
    ss.campus_tier,
    CAST(ROUND(ss.segment_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS segment_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nt.national_total_sales_52w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (100 * ss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0)
          END,
          0
        ),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(
        ROUND((100 * ss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER
      )
    END AS contribution_52w_value
  FROM segment_sales_cte ss
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  campus_tier,
  segment_sales_52w,
  contribution_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY
  contribution_52w_value DESC,
  segment_sales_52w DESC;

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m ON 1 = 1
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND t.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
  ) x
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(week_end_date) AS min_r4w_week
      FROM r4w_weeks_cte
    ) b
      ON d.week_end_date < b.min_r4w_week
  ) y
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
weeks_count_cte AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r4w_weeks_cte) AS r4w_week_cnt,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p4w_weeks_cte) AS p4w_week_cnt
),
r4w_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS r4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY t.campus_account_type
),
p4w_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_p4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY t.campus_account_type
),
child_type_combined_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(r.campus_account_type, p.campus_account_type) AS campus_account_type,
    COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) AS sales_4w,
    COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS sales_p4w,
    r.r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    p.p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM r4w_by_child_type_cte r
  FULL OUTER JOIN p4w_by_child_type_cte p
    ON r.campus_account_type = p.campus_account_type
),
national_r4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS national_r4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
national_p4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_p4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS national_p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
national_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.national_sales_4w,
    p.national_sales_p4w,
    r.national_r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    p.national_p4w_included_week_end_dates,
    wc.r4w_week_cnt,
    wc.p4w_week_cnt,
    CASE
      WHEN (wc.r4w_week_cnt <> 4 OR wc.p4w_week_cnt <> 4) THEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) > 0
                THEN 100
              WHEN (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                THEN 0
              ELSE (
                (
                  (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) -
                  (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0))
                ) * 100.0
                / NULLIF((COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)), 0)
              )
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0)
                   / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0), 0)
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
    END AS national_growth_int,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_abs_change_4w
  FROM national_r4w_cte r
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_cte p
  CROSS JOIN weeks_count_cte wc
),
final_result_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    c.r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    c.p4w_included_week_end_dates,
    n.national_sales_4w,
    n.national_sales_p4w,
    n.national_growth_int,
    n.national_abs_change_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN (n.r4w_week_cnt <> 4 OR n.p4w_week_cnt <> 4) THEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) > 0
                THEN 100
              WHEN (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                THEN 0
              ELSE (
                (
                  (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) -
                  (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0))
                ) * 100.0
                / NULLIF((COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)), 0)
              )
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0)
                   / NULLIF(COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0), 0)
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
    END AS child_growth_int,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w
  FROM child_type_combined_cte c
  CROSS JOIN national_growth_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  sales_4w,
  sales_p4w,
  CONCAT(child_growth_int, '%') AS growth_4w_pct,
  abs_change_4w,
  r4w_included_week_end_dates,
  p4w_included_week_end_dates,
  CAST(ROUND(national_sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_4w,
  CAST(ROUND(national_sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_p4w,
  CONCAT(national_growth_int, '%') AS national_growth_4w_pct,

  CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(child_growth_int - national_growth_int, 0) AS INTEGER), '%') AS growth_gap_vs_nation_4w_pp,
  CASE

    WHEN child_growth_int < national_growth_int THEN 'Lower'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS performance_vs_nation
FROM final_result_cte
ORDER BY campus_account_type ASC;

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 4 weeks compared to previous 4 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
weeks_ranked_cte AS (
  SELECT
    week_end_date,
    week_rank,
    CASE
      WHEN week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'R4W'
      WHEN week_rank BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 'P4W'
      WHEN week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 52 THEN 'R52W'
    END AS period_flag
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank
    FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
      FROM data_867
      WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) d
  )
  WHERE week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 52
),
period_week_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN period_flag = 'R4W' THEN weeks_count END), 0) AS r4w_week_count,
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN period_flag = 'P4W' THEN weeks_count END), 0) AS p4w_week_count
  FROM (
    SELECT
      period_flag,
      COUNT(DISTINCT week_end_date) AS weeks_count
    FROM weeks_ranked_cte
    WHERE period_flag IN ('R4W', 'P4W')
    GROUP BY period_flag
  ) c
),
area_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_prev_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R52W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_sales_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_sales_prev_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R52W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
final_area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region AS "campus_region (Area)",
    CAST(ROUND(a.sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(ROUND(a.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(a.sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_sales_52w > 0
              THEN (a.sales_52w * 1.0 / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0)) * 100
            ELSE 0
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN a.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND a.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN a.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND a.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        THEN 'Higher'
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN a.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND a.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        <
        (
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        THEN 'Lower'
      ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_r4w",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_p4w",
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN n.national_sales_52w > 0
          THEN (a.sales_52w * 1.0 / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0)) * 100
        ELSE 0
      END,
      0
    ) AS contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM area_period_sales_cte a
  CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte n
  CROSS JOIN period_week_counts_cte c
  LEFT JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON w.period_flag IN ('R4W', 'P4W')
  GROUP BY
    a.campus_region,
    a.sales_52w,
    a.sales_4w,
    a.sales_prev_4w,
    n.national_sales_52w,
    n.national_sales_4w,
    n.national_sales_prev_4w,
    c.r4w_week_count,
    c.p4w_week_count
),
nation_row_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'Nation' AS "campus_region (Area)",
    CAST(ROUND(n.national_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(ROUND(n.national_sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(n.national_sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    '100%' AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    'Equal' AS "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_r4w",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_p4w",
    100 AS contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM national_period_sales_cte n
  CROSS JOIN period_week_counts_cte c
  LEFT JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON w.period_flag IN ('R4W', 'P4W')
  GROUP BY
    n.national_sales_52w,
    n.national_sales_4w,
    n.national_sales_prev_4w,
    c.r4w_week_count,
    c.p4w_week_count
),
final_union_cte AS (
  SELECT
    "campus_region (Area)",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    "weeks_included_r4w",
    "weeks_included_p4w",
    contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM final_area_metrics_cte

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "campus_region (Area)",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    "weeks_included_r4w",
    "weeks_included_p4w",
    contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM nation_row_cte
)
SELECT
  "campus_region (Area)",
  sales_52w,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
  "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
  "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
  "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
  "weeks_included_r4w",
  "weeks_included_p4w"
FROM final_union_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_value_sort DESC;

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 4 weeks compared to previous 4 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
weeks_ranked_cte AS (
  SELECT
    week_end_date,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank_desc,
    CASE
      WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'R4W'
      WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 'P4W'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS period_flag
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.week_end_date
    FROM data_867 t
    WHERE t.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  ) d
  QUALIFY week_rank_desc BETWEEN 1 AND 52
),
r52w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_region,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.week_rank_desc BETWEEN 1 AND 52
  GROUP BY t.campus_region
),
national_r52w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.week_rank_desc BETWEEN 1 AND 52
),
r4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_region,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'R4W'
  GROUP BY t.campus_region
),
p4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_region,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'P4W'
  GROUP BY t.campus_region
),
national_r4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'R4W'
),
national_p4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'P4W'
),
areas_cte AS (
  SELECT campus_region FROM r52w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM r4w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM p4w_area_sales_cte
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region,
    CAST(COALESCE(r52.sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(COALESCE(r4.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(COALESCE(p4.sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    n52.national_sales_52w,
    n4.national_sales_4w,
    np4.national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM areas_cte a
  LEFT JOIN r52w_area_sales_cte r52
    ON r52.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN r4w_area_sales_cte r4
    ON r4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN p4w_area_sales_cte p4
    ON p4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte np4
),
area_metrics_formatted_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_52w > 0
            THEN ROUND((sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0), 0)
          ELSE 0
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((sales_4w - sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((national_sales_4w - national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN
        CASE
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(ROUND(((sales_4w - sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_prev_4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END
        >=
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(ROUND(((national_sales_4w - national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END
        THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS vs_nation,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN national_sales_52w > 0
          THEN ROUND((sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0), 0)
        ELSE 0
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM area_metrics_cte
),
national_row_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'Nation' AS campus_region,
    CAST(n52.national_sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(n4.national_sales_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(np4.national_sales_prev_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(CAST(CASE WHEN n52.national_sales_52w > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS INTEGER), '%') AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((n4.national_sales_4w - np4.national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(np4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((n4.national_sales_4w - np4.national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(np4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    'Equal' AS vs_nation,
    CASE WHEN n52.national_sales_52w > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte np4
),
final_union_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_52w,
    growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM area_metrics_formatted_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_52w,
    growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM national_row_cte
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  sales_52w,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  contribution_pct_52w,
  growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
  nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
  vs_nation
FROM final_union_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_52w_value DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_window_start_cte AS (

)
SELECT
